---
title: ""
image: "images/logo-surveydown.png"
execute: 
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 16em
  id: hero-heading
page-layout: full
toc: false
back-to-top-navigation: false

format:
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: false
---

# Welcome to surveydown.org!

{{< include chunks/description.qmd >}}

<br>

```{=html}
<div class="home-pills">
  <a class="home-pill" href="about.html"><span class="home-pill-label"><i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i>About</span><span class="home-pill-desc">About the package and the open-source technologies behind it.</span></a>
  <a class="home-pill" href="templates.html"><span class="home-pill-label"><i class="bi bi-grid-1x2"></i>Templates</span><span class="home-pill-desc">Templates for an easy start.</span></a>
  <a class="home-pill" href="docs.html"><span class="home-pill-label"><i class="bi bi-book"></i>Documentation</span><span class="home-pill-desc">Comprehensive documentation for building surveys with surveydown.</span></a>
  <a class="home-pill" href="faq.html"><span class="home-pill-label"><i class="bi bi-question-circle"></i>FAQ</span><span class="home-pill-desc">Frequently asked questions.</span></a>
</div>
```
